title: Corrects typo in the name of the Linux package shadow-utils.
body:
During troubleshooting it is important that users are not instructed to check a package that is misspelt (`shadows-utils`), instead, the instruction should contain the correct name (`shadow-utils`).

Signed-off-by: Bence Mélykúti <bence.melykuti@gmail.com>

comments.body:
@Melykuti you need to sign your Commit.

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

Once it is signed LGTM
